name: Estacado
description_short: Estacado Federal Credit Union is a federally insured credit union serving Lea County, NM and portions of West Texas with membership-based banking, loans, and certificates of deposit.
description_long:
Estacado Federal Credit Union (Estacado FCU) is a member-owned financial cooperative headquartered in Hobbs, New Mexico, with a service area spanning Lea County, New Mexico and Gaines, Yoakum, and Cochran counties in Texas. The credit union operates multiple branches across ten communities including Hobbs, Lovington, Eunice, Jal, Tatum, Seminole, Seagraves, Denver City, Plains, Morton, and Whiteface, serving members who live, work, worship, or attend school in their defined geographic areas.

Estacado FCU offers a comprehensive range of financial products including share accounts (savings), Visa accounts (checking), certificates of deposit with rates from 6 to 60 months starting at $1,000 minimum, personal loans, first mortgages, and vehicle financing. Members have access to online banking, mobile app services, ATM networks, electronic bill pay, and loan payment options. All deposit accounts are insured up to $250,000 by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA), providing standard federal protection.

As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, Estacado operates on a not-for-profit, member-owned model. The institution emphasizes convenience through 11 distinct loan payment methods including automatic recurring payments at no cost, online web payments, mobile banking, ATM deposits, payroll deduction, and bill pay integration. They also offer loan skip-a-payment services for $40 and maintain accessibility commitments aligned with ADA guidelines.

Estacado FCU is best suited for individuals and families within their geographic service area seeking community-based banking with competitive certificate rates and flexible loan options. However, the institution's strict membership requirements based on location create a significant limitation for those outside their defined counties, and their website provides limited information on loan terms, rates, and specific product details compared to larger regional or national credit unions.
services: Vehicle loans and dealer vehicle sales
Online banking via Estacado Online platform
Electronic bill pay and fund transfers
Remote deposit capture via mobile app
pros: NCUA-insured deposits up to $250,000 for account security
Competitive certificate rates available from 6 to 60 months starting at just $1,000
Automatic recurring loan payments offered at no cost to members
11 distinct loan payment methods including online, mobile, ATM, and payroll deduction options
Multiple physical branches across 10 communities in NM and West Texas
Not-for-profit credit union structure returns profits to member-owners
Loan skip-a-payment service available for $40 with restrictions
cons: Strict geographic membership requirements limit availability to Lea County NM and specific Texas counties only
Limited online disclosure of loan rates, terms, and APR information on website
Online web loan payments incur fees ($4.95 for debit/ACH or 3% for credit card payments)
Website lacks detailed product comparison tools or rate calculators beyond basic mentions
No indication of competitive rates compared to other credit unions or regional banks
best_for: Residents and employees of Lea County, New Mexico seeking community-based banking
Workers and students in Gaines, Yoakum, or Cochran counties, Texas needing local credit union services
Members looking for competitive CD rates with flexible term lengths and low minimums
Individuals preferring automatic recurring loan payments without monthly processing fees
diagnosis: Estacado FCU is best for individuals and families within their five-county service area (Lea County NM and Gaines/Yoakum/Cochran counties TX) who value local branch access, member-owned structure, and no-fee automatic loan payments. The primary caveat is that membership is strictly geographically limited, and the website provides insufficient detail on competitive rates and loan terms to evaluate pricing against alternatives.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Estacado — Credit Union in HOBBS, NM | CreditDoc
meta_description: Estacado — NCUA-insured credit union in HOBBS, NM. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
